title: manilkara letestui
intro: Manilkara letestui, also known as the balatá tree, is a species of tree in the family Sapotaceae, native to the island of New Caledonia. The bark of the Manilkara letestui tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Manilkara letestui include treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting against bacterial infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
